title: Data Engineer
location: Malduguņu iela 2, Mārupe, Mārupes novads, LV-2167

summary.lv: GOStack SIA meklē Data Engineer, kurš veidos un attīstīs mākoņa datu platformas, pārvaldīs datu cauruļvadus un transformāciju modeļus. Hibrīds darbs, atalgojums €4500–8000 mēnesī.
summary.en: GOStack SIA is seeking a Data Engineer to build and evolve cloud-native data platforms, own data pipelines and transformation models, and enable data-driven decision-making, offering €4,500–8,000/month.
